heading: Step 1: Send a  request.
body:
Send a `GET` request with either the unique ID or name of
the MongoDB Search index that you wish to retrieve to the `search/indexes/` endpoint.

> **Note:** This `curl` command uses a service account access token ([OAuth 2.0](https://oauth.net/2/)) to authenticate
> instead of API keys. To learn more, see [API Access Lists endpoint](atlas-admin-api-access).

```sh
curl --header "Authorization: Bearer {ACCESS-TOKEN}" \
--header "Accept: application/json" \
--include \
--request GET "https://cloud.mongodb.com/api/atlas/v2/groups/{groupId}/clusters/{clusterName}/search/indexes/{indexId}"
```

To learn more about the syntax and parameters for either
endpoint, see [Get One By Name](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-getgroupclustersearchindexbyname) and
[Get One By ID](api/doc/atlas-admin-api-v2/operation/operation-getgroupclustersearchindex).
